summary: Iteration 6 - Trading Features Testing Complete. All backend APIs and frontend pages working correctly. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (GET /api/games, GET /api/trades, GET /api/orders, GET /api/kalshi/categories, GET /api/kalshi/markets, GET /api/strategies/summary, POST /api/autonomous/enable|disable). Frontend: All 4 key pages verified (Terminal/Dashboard, Trades Center, Strategy Command Center, All Games). New TradesCenter page shows 96 paper trades with KPI summary and filters. Strategy Command Center has radio buttons for Evaluation Mode and Auto Mode. All Games page shows basketball categories (NBA, WNBA, NCAA M/W, EuroLeague, ABA, BBL).

issues: Minor hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - caused by React rendering in tables. Does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/games returns games with game, signal, markets, fair_prob_home/away, confidence, intelligence, is_clutch - all working
GET /api/trades returns trades with is_paper flag (not 'type'), status, pnl fields - frontend correctly maps this
GET /api/orders returns 50 orders with proper structure
GET /api/kalshi/categories returns basketball category tree with NBA, WNBA, NCAA_M, NCAA_W, EuroLeague, ABA, BBL children
GET /api/kalshi/markets returns 0 markets (expected - no open markets currently)
GET /api/strategies/summary returns enabled, evaluation_mode, auto_mode, strategies (3 models), comparison, winning_model fields
Frontend TradesCenter.js correctly implemented with KPI strip (data-testid='kpi-strip'), filter bar (data-testid='filter-bar'), trades table (data-testid='trades-table')

Frontend EnhancedStrategyCommandCenter.js has radio buttons for Evaluation Mode (data-testid='evaluation-on-radio', 'evaluation-off-radio') and Auto Mode (data-testid='auto-mode-on-radio', 'auto-mode-off-radio')
Frontend AllGamesPage.js shows categories sidebar with all basketball leagues
Frontend Dashboard.jsx has Trades nav link in navigation
seed_data_creation: None - using existing paper trades (96 trades) and real Kalshi basketball data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 6 are working: 1) Terminal page shows 4 games with status badges and Trade actions. 2) Trades Center (/trades) shows 96 paper trades with KPI summary (Total Paper P/L, Total Live P/L, Open Paper Trades, Open Live Trades), filter bar (Type, Status, Side, Date Range), and trades table with all required columns. 3) Strategy Command Center (/strategy-command-center) has radio buttons for Evaluation Mode (ON/OFF) and Auto Mode (ON/OFF). 4) All Games page (/all-games) shows basketball categories sidebar with NBA, WNBA, NCAA M/W, EuroLeague, ABA, BBL. Backend API: trades have 'is_paper' flag not 'type' field, frontend useTrades hook correctly maps this.

mocked_apis_list: KalshiAdapterSandbox - simulation mode for paper trading
mocked_apis.real_data: Kalshi basketball data ingestion uses real API to populate events/markets in DB
